basic_details.job_title: ICAR CICR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Research Fellow and Young Professional Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR Central Institute for Cotton Research
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional II, Young Professional I
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR Central Institute for Cotton Research (ICAR CICR) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional II, and Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. Candidates aged between 21 and 45 years and holding M.Sc. (Agriculture), M.Sc. (Ag.), B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology, or B.Sc. Agriculture qualifications in the relevant disciplines are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 27 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt. of India rules

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Agriculture with Specialization in Remote sensing and GIS / Agrometeorology/ Agronomy/ Soil Science, BE/ BTech in Computer Science and Engineering or Information Technology, M.Sc. (Ag.) Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Science & Technology, B.Sc. Agriculture
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Sc. in Agriculture with Specialization in Remote sensing and GIS / Agrometeorology/ Agronomy/ Soil Science Young Professional II (YP II): BE/ BTech in Computer Science and Engineering or Information Technology Young Professional II (YP II): M.Sc. (Ag.) Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Science & Technology Young Professional I (YP I): B.Sc. Agriculture

M.Sc. in Agriculture with Specialization in Remote sensing and GIS / Agrometeorology/ Agronomy/ Soil Science, BE/ BTech in Computer Science and Engineering or Information Technology, M.Sc. (Ag.) Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Science & Technology, B.Sc. Agriculture

content_sections.heading: ICAR CICR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR-CICR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR-CICR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Sc. in Agriculture with Specialization in Remote sensing and GIS / Agrometeorology/ Agronomy/ Soil Science Young Professional II (YP II): BE/ BTech in Computer Science and Engineering or Information Technology Young Professional II (YP II): M.Sc. (Ag.) Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Science & Technology Young Professional I (YP I): B.Sc. Agriculture

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt. of India rules

rows.event: Walk-in Interview for SRF and YP II

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-CICR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in dates are 27th July 2026 for SRF and YP-II, and 28th July 2026 for YP-I. Candidates should attend the interview on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICAR-CICR?
faq.answer: ICAR-CICR has announced a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional-II, and Young Professional-I.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications range from B.Sc. Agriculture to M.Sc. in various specializations like Remote Sensing and GIS, Agrometeorology, Agronomy, Soil Science, Genetics and Plant Breeding, Seed Science & Technology, and BE/BTech in Computer Science and Engineering or IT.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ICAR-CICR recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all the posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the different posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000/- per month for Young Professional-I to Rs. 42,000/- per month for Young Professional-II, and Rs. 37,000/- + 18% HRA for Senior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply by attending the walk-in interview with all the required original documents and photocopies at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ICAR-CICR recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ICAR-CICR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICAR-Central Institute for Cotton Research, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, 641003.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-CICR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in dates are 27th July 2026 for SRF and YP-II, and 28th July 2026 for YP-I. Candidates should attend the interview on these dates.
